posts.title: css实现背景椭圆
posts.text: html123<div class="pure_top" > </div> css123456789position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 113px; -webkit-transition: .4s; transition: .4s; border-radius: 0 0 50% 50%; background-color: aqua 显示效果

posts.text: 代码如下12345api.addEventListener({ name: 'viewdisappear' }, function () { api.closeFrame(); });

posts.title: apicloud 上拉加载动画
posts.text: html 部分1234567<div id="test"> <p> <!-- <span class="iconfont iconjiazai" v-show='isShow'></span> --> <img src="../../icon/jiazai.png" class="iconjiazai" alt="" v-show='isShow'> <span>{{test}}</span> </p> </div> css部分1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829#test { height: 0; transition: height 500ms; overflow: hidden; text-align: center; color: #999 } .iconjiazai { display: inline-block; animation: test 1s infinite linear; -webkit-animation: test 1s infinite linear; width: 16px; } @keyframes test { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate(359deg); } } #test p{ display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } js部分1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344api.addEventListener({ name: 'scrolltobottom', }, function (ret, err) { //在这里面调用相应的方法 document.getElementById('test').style.height = "5vh" if (vm.isShow) { vm.page++ Http.get({ path: Http.API_URL.FA, data: { page: vm.page }, success: function (ret) { if (ret.status_code == 1) { if (ret.data.list.length !== 0) { vm.listTwo = vm.listTwo.concat(ret.data.list) } else { setTimeout(() => { vm.isShow = false vm.test = '没有更多数据了' document.getElementById('test').style.height = "0" }, 2000); } } else { api.toast({ msg: ret.message, duration: 2000, location: 'bottom' }); } } }) } else { setTimeout(() => { vm.isShow = false vm.test = '没有更多数据了' document.getElementById('test').style.height = "0" }, 1000); } })

posts.title: js 数组过滤
posts.text: 最近在做购物车项目做到了商品规格选择这方面,需要根据选中的状态来筛选出相应的规格,原始数据如下需要渲染的规格为 1234attrs: { "颜色": ["黑色", "白色", "灰色"], "尺码": ["L", "XL", "XXL"] }, 所有包含的规格列表为 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546var a = [{ "颜色": "黑色", "尺码": "L", "price": "99", "stock": "9999" }, { "颜色": "黑色", "尺码": "XL", "price": "99", "stock": "9999" }, { "颜色": "黑色", "尺码": "XXL", "price": "99", "stock": "9999" }, { "颜色": "白色", "尺码": "L", "price": "99", "stock": "9999" }, { "颜色": "白色", "尺码": "XL", "price": "213213", "stock": "23672163723" }, { "颜色": "白色", "尺码": "XXL", "price": "99", "stock": "9999" }, { "颜色": "灰色", "尺码": "L", "price": "99", "stock": "9999" }, { "颜色": "灰色", "尺码": "XL", "price": "99", "stock": "9999" }, { "颜色": "灰色", "尺码": "XXL", "price": "0", "stock": "ewqewqe" }] 多规格多数据筛选这里有两种方法 第一种12345678910111213141516171819202122 var filter = function multiFilter(array, filters) { const filterKeys = Object.keys(filters) return array.filter((item) => { return filterKeys.every(key => { if (!filters[key].length) return true return !!~filters[key].indexOf(item[key]) }) }) }//需要查找的规格var sku = { 颜色: ['白色',], 尺码:['XL'] } console.log(filter(list,sku)) //得到的数据为 [{ price: "213213" stock: "23672163723" 尺码: "XL" 颜色: "白色" }] 第二种12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031 let filter = (sku, list) => { return data.filter(item => { return Object.keys(condition).every(key => { return String(item[key]).toLowerCase().includes( String(condition[key]).trim().toLowerCase()) }) }) } //需要查找的条件 var sku = { 颜色:'白色', 尺码:'XL' } console.log(filter(sku,a)) //这里会有两个数据 [ { price: "213213" stock: "23672163723" 尺码: "XL" 颜色: "白色" }, { price: "99" stock: "9999" 尺码: "XXL" 颜色: "白色" } ]

posts.title: vant ui NoticeBar设置显示内容不滚动
posts.slug: vant ui NoticeBar设置显示内容不滚动
posts.path: 2019/12/05/vant ui NoticeBar设置显示内容不滚动/
posts.text: 使用 vant ui 从后台获取数据后通知栏不滚动的问题第一次代码如下1<van-notice-bar color="red" background="#fff" left-icon="volume-o" >{{notice.title}}</van-notice-bar> 这样的话不会滚动, 将代码更改后实现效果1<van-notice-bar color="red" background="#fff" left-icon="volume-o" :text="notice.title"></van-notice-bar>

posts.title: Apicloud 键盘弹出遮挡div上面的input
posts.slug: Apicloud 键盘弹出遮挡frame上面的input问题
posts.path: 2019/12/05/Apicloud 键盘弹出遮挡frame上面的input问题/
posts.text: 这个div需要在屏幕中间显示,但是div是使用position:fixed来实现的,需要用到jquery, 代码如下1234567891011121314// 键盘弹出遮挡input的问题 var winHeight = $(window).height(); //获取当前页面高度 $(window).resize(function () { var thisHeight = $(this).height(); if (winHeight - thisHeight > 140) { //键盘弹出 console.log('键盘弹出') } else { //键盘收起 console.log('键盘收起') } })

posts.title: Apicloud 中使用vue监听某个div滚动到底部
posts.slug: apicloud中使用vue监听某个div滚动到底部
posts.path: 2019/12/03/apicloud中使用vue监听某个div滚动到底部/
posts.text: 代码如下初始化加载的数据12345678methods: { send: function () { var self = this for (let i = 0; i < 30; i++) { self.list.push(self.list.length + 1); } } }, 12345678910111213141516171819mounted: function () { this.send() // vue下拉滚动监听 this.$nextTick(() => { const el = document.querySelector('.list'); const offsetHeight = el.offsetHeight; el.onscroll = () => { const scrollTop = el.scrollTop; const scrollHeight = el.scrollHeight; if ((offsetHeight + scrollTop) - scrollHeight >= -1) { // 需要执行的代码 console.log('到底部了') for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) { vm.list.push(vm.list.length + 1); } } }; }); },

posts.title: vue v-for动态渲染绑定不同class
posts.slug: vue v-for动态渲染绑定不同class
posts.text: 原始数据如下格式1234567891011121314data(){ return { list:[ {type:1,age:28}, {type:1,age:28}, {type:1,age:28}, {type:2,age:28}, {type:2,age:28}, {type:2,age:28}, {type:2,age:28}, {type:2,age:28}, {type:2,age:28}, ] } html 内容1<p v-for='(item,x) in list ' :key='x' :class="[item.type == 1 ? 'blue' : 'red']">{{item.age}}</P> css123456blue { color:blue}red { color: red}

posts.title: vue点击Active效果
posts.text: 设置一个常量 12345data(){ return { active:-1 }} html加上代码1<span v-for='(item,x) in list' :key='x' @click='change(x)' :class="active == x ? 'red' : '' "></span> 点击事件123change(e){ this.active = x} Active class123red{ color:red}

posts.title: Apilcoud常用方法
posts.text: 上拉加载12345api.addEventListener({ name: 'scrolltobottom', }, function (ret, err) { //在这里面调用相应的方法 }) 下拉刷新123456789101112//下拉刷新动作 api.setRefreshHeaderInfo({ visible: true, bgColor: '#F0F0F0', textDown: '下拉刷新...', textUp: '松开刷新...', showTime: true }, function(ret, err) { //执行方法 api.refreshHeaderLoadDone(); //加载完毕后停止下拉刷新 });

posts.title: 数组对象常用的方法
posts.text: 取出数组对象中所有 key 值为 name 并输出为数组1234567let a=[{name:'张三',age:'1'},{name:'张三',age:'1'},]var a= data.map(item=>{ return item['name']})console.log(a) //["张三", "李四"] 取出数组对象中所有 key 值为 a 的对象123456789101112let data = [ {a:'1',b:'2'}, {a:'1',b:'2'}, {a:'1',b:'2'}, {a:'1',b:'2'}, {a:'99',b:'2'}, {a:'99',b:'2'}, ]var a = data.filter(item=>item.a == '99)console.log(a) //[{a:'99',b:'2'},{a:'99',b:'2'}]
